query: SELECT id, name, bua, gfaSqft, manualBuaSqft, landPrice, agentCommissionLandPct, estimatedConstructionPricePerSqft, designFeePct, supervisionFeePct, salesCommissionPct, marketingPct, developerFeePct, separationFeePerM2, soilTestFee, topographicSurveyFee, reraUnitRegFee, developerNocFee, escrowAccountFee, bankFees, communityFees, surveyorFees, reraAuditReportFee, reraInspectionReportFee, reraProjectRegFee, officialBodiesFees, gfaResidentialSqft, gfaRetailSqft, gfaOfficesSqft, permittedUse, areaCode, plotNumber FROM projects WHERE name LIKE '%6185392%' LIMIT 3;
